title: Various Structures
description: A datapack with a lot of structures to enhance your world.
body:
# Various Structures
Adds a bunch of structures to spice up your world. 

You can find structures using /locate structure knize:<name>  or /locate structure smne:<name>   (if you cant find a structure, check the second namespace)

Some structures have custom loot tables and/or secrets. 

### Structure list
- Badlands house 
- Big bee nest
- Birch roof
- Burning pile
- Giant pyramid
- Goat horn center
- Iceberg house
- Modern house
- Noob fortress
- Pufferfish statue
- Pumpkin dungeon
- Reinforced pillar
- Dark forest ritual place
- Giant roller coaster
- Small camp
- Toilet hut
- Villager statue
- Volleyball court
- Forest castle ruins
- Crashed plane
- Diorite gate
- Log cabin
- Meditation garden
- Mossroof house
- Panda statue
- Abandoned raft
- Savanna farm
- Water camp
- Windmill
- Winter cabin
